name: smart-compact
description: Run Smart Compact v9 and create a task with its selected token-saving lane.

interface.shortDescription: Apply the v9 parent-token optimizer before a task starts.
interface.longDescription: Smart Compact v9 is the sole current product generation. Select its internal treatment from routing mode, task shape, model family, and effort; apply routing before inference; or start the public v9 profile manually.
defaultPrompt: Recommend the Smart Compact v9 treatment for my next task
Start a Smart Compact v9 task here
